0: (Demonic citizens) Gah, how did this happen!?
It's too soon to feel safe...
[->]All in the Eastern Kingdom of Mikado...
are now awakened... Reinforcements are
en route... Ugh...
[END]
100: (Dagda) There are 20 turns left. Hurry, Kid.
[END]
101: (Dagda) C'mon, kid−−only 10 turns left.
[END]
102: (Dagda) 5 more turns... This is looking grim.
[END]
103: (Dagda) Damn. You failed, kid. It's too late, 
now.
[->]Everyone in the kingdom is now infected.
[Color:0x5]Including you[Color:0x0].
[END]
104: 〉 Dagda looks at you bitterly.
[->]〉 As he does, you notice what's 
happening to your body...
[END]
